languages.text: "Послушайте, мы угодили в ловушку ксеносов. Все вокруг — всего лишь реплика!"

traits.locale_text: "Послушайте, мы угодили в ловушку ксеносов. Все вокруг — всего лишь реплика!"

languages.text: "Can't you see we have fallen into a xenos trap? Everything around you is just a replica!"
languages.original_text: "Послушайте, мы угодили в ловушку ксеносов. Все вокруг — всего лишь реплика!"

traits.locale_text: "Can't you see we have fallen into a xenos trap? Everything around you is just a replica!"
"Can't you see we have fallen into a xenos trap? Everything around you is just a replica!"
"Can't you see we have fallen into a xenos trap? Everything around you is just a replica!"

languages.text: “你看不出来吗？我们已经掉进异形的陷阱了！你眼前的一切，全都是复制出来的假象！”
languages.original_text: "Can't you see we have fallen into a xenos trap? Everything around you is just a replica!"

traits.locale_text: “你看不出来吗？我们已经掉进异形的陷阱了！你眼前的一切，全都是复制出来的假象！”

languages.text: « Vous ne voyez donc pas que nous sommes tombés dans le piège d'un xénos ? Tout ce qui nous entoure n'est qu'une réplique ! »
languages.original_text: "Can't you see we have fallen into a xenos trap? Everything around you is just a replica!"

traits.locale_text: « Vous ne voyez donc pas que nous sommes tombés dans le piège d'un xénos ? Tout ce qui nous entoure n'est qu'une réplique ! »

languages.text: "Zeno tuzağına düştüğümüzü göremiyor musun? Etrafındaki her şey birer kopyadan ibaret!"
languages.original_text: "Can't you see we have fallen into a xenos trap? Everything around you is just a replica!"

traits.locale_text: "Zeno tuzağına düştüğümüzü göremiyor musun? Etrafındaki her şey birer kopyadan ibaret!"

languages.text: «¿No ve que estamos en una trampa xenos? ¡Todo lo que la rodea es una réplica!».
languages.original_text: "Can't you see we have fallen into a xenos trap? Everything around you is just a replica!"

traits.locale_text: «¿No ve que estamos en una trampa xenos? ¡Todo lo que la rodea es una réplica!».

languages.text: "Erkennt Ihr nicht, dass wir in eine Falle der Xenos getappt sind? Alles um Euch herum ist nur eine Replik!"
languages.original_text: "Can't you see we have fallen into a xenos trap? Everything around you is just a replica!"

traits.locale_text: "Erkennt Ihr nicht, dass wir in eine Falle der Xenos getappt sind? Alles um Euch herum ist nur eine Replik!"

languages.text: 「我々は異種族の罠にはまったのに気づかないのか？ 周囲の全ては模造品だ！」
languages.original_text: "Can't you see we have fallen into a xenos trap? Everything around you is just a replica!"

traits.locale_text: 「我々は異種族の罠にはまったのに気づかないのか？ 周囲の全ては模造品だ！」
